user.title: Connect to WLED
user.description: Enter the IP address of your WLED device (find it in the WLED app or your router). Leave segment at 0 unless you've split your strip into segments.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the WLED device. Check the IP address.

abort.already_configured: This WLED device is already configured.

add_mapping.title: Add alert
add_mapping.description: When the entity enters one of the trigger states, its LED lights in the chosen color. To-do lists trigger automatically whenever they have pending items — no states needed.

data.alert_states: Trigger states (pick or type your own)
Trigger states (pick or type your own)
